Advisory.Description:
## Duplicate Advisory

This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-g99v-8hwm-g76g. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.3.1 contain a server-side request forgery vulnerability in web_search citation redirect resolution that uses a private-network-allowing SSRF policy. An attacker who can influence citation redirect targets can trigger internal-network requests from the OpenClaw host to loopback, private, or internal destinations.
Advisory.Summary: Duplicate Advisory: web_search citation redirect SSRF via private-network-allowing policy
